title: pinalia rufinula
intro: Pinalia rufinula, also known as the red-petaled pinalia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, derived from the iridoids present in its roots. The health benefits of Pinalia rufinula include potential applications in treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its possible role in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Pinalia rufinula is traditionally prepared as a decoction or a tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
